name: Manta Style
description: An axe made of reflective materials that causes confusion amongst enemy ranks.

abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Creates multiple mirrored illusions of the wielder that deals a portion of the wielder's damage and receives additional incoming damage. Cooldown: 34. Mana Cost: 125. Number of Illusions: 2. Duration: 18. Damage Dealt: 33%. Damage Taken: 300%.
